description_long: This object is a decorative potted plant featuring a lush cluster of green, heart-shaped leaves sprouting from a spherical moss ball. The moss ball is suspended above a rustic, dark wooden base by a slender black metal rod, giving the plant a floating appearance. The leaves are light to medium green, with some showing slight curling and natural variation in size and orientation. The wooden base has a natural, uneven texture, adding to the organic aesthetic. The moss ball appears dense and textured, with a mottled green and brown coloration. This arrangement is both minimalist and elegant, suitable for modern urban interiors or stylish outdoor settings.
description: A floating moss ball potted plant with heart-shaped green leaves, suspended above a rustic wooden base by a thin black rod. The design is minimalist and organic, blending natural textures with modern presentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full spread of green leaves and the spherical moss ball centered above the wooden base.
description_view_1: Direct head-on view highlighting the symmetry of the plant and the straight alignment of the rod and base.
description_view_2: Angled view revealing the side profile of the moss ball and the layered arrangement of leaves.
description_view_3: Rear view with leaves partially obscuring the moss ball, showing the back of the wooden base and rod.
